metadata.title: Memos Sync
metadata.description: Syncing memos from a [Memos](https://github.com/usememos/memos) server to your daily note. Fully compatible with official Daily Notes plugin, Calendar plugin and Periodic Notes plugin.

regex.source: .setDesc("The header for the daily memos section.")
regex.target: .setDesc("每日笔记中的标题，Memos 会替换其下面的内容。")
.setDesc("你的 Memos 服务器的版本。")
.setDesc("Memos API 的令牌。你可以在 Memos>设置>我的账号 页面创建一个。")

regex.source:
.createEl("h3", {
        text: "Attention: Daily Notes is not enabled.",
regex.target:
.createEl("h3", {
        text: "提示：未开启每日笔记功能",

regex.source:
.createEl("p", {
        text: "Daily Notes feature is not enabled.",

.createEl("p", {
        text: "Please enable the official Daily Notes plugin or daily notes feature in Periodic Notes plugin. Otherwise, this plugin will not work properly.",
